# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.SsaSpikeDetector

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Kind: `class`

IScanTransform for SSA-based spike detection. Each observation: predict → score → p-value → alert.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class SsaSpikeDetector : HPD.ML.Abstractions.IScanTransform<HPD.ML.TimeSeries.SsaAnomalyState>, HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```
